item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested field addition as a default, explicitly identifies the repeated pattern across prior additions (盖章、税率、交付日期) plus the new 质保条款 request, and moves upstream to the missing required-information architecture/source-of-truth and validation problem. It proposes consolidation into a unified inquiry/quotation required-information checklist and assignment of where each item belongs. The temporary emergency field is bounded as one-time and not a baseline change, so it does not constitute the fail signal."}
